summary: Iteration 13 Testing Complete - All user-reported bug fixes verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features tested and working including map ZIP search, settings page tier/role display, and draggable chat widget.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin seed correctly upgrades existing users to owner/mega on startup
Geocode API uses Nominatim with proper User-Agent header
Places search uses Overpass API with 24-hour caching in places_cache collection
Admin cleanup-test-data endpoint properly deletes test users and their data
Admin setup-breeder endpoint generates PBK-BR-* breeder IDs
Chat widget drag implemented with mousedown/mousemove/mouseup events and position state
Settings page correctly displays membership_tier and role from user object
seed_data_creation: None - test data was cleaned up via admin endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All user-reported bugs fixed and verified: 1) Map ZIP search works - geocode API returns coordinates, places search returns cached results (50 vets found for 90210). 2) Settings page shows correct tier (MEGA) and role (Owner/Site Owner) for admin. 3) Chat widget is draggable - has cursor-grab class, GripVertical icon, and position changes on drag. 4) Test data cleaned up - feed shows 'No posts yet'. 5) Admin breeder credentials set up with PBK-BR-* ID. 6) Admin login works on deployed site.

admin_login.notes: admin@petbookin.com can login with correct password

admin_profile.notes: Returns role=owner, tier=mega, is_admin=true, is_seller=true, breeder_id=PBK-BR-*

geocode_zip.notes: Returns lat/lng coordinates for Beverly Hills area

admin_cleanup.notes: Deletes test users and their posts/pets

admin_setup_breeder.notes: Sets up breeder credentials with PBK-BR-* ID

frontend_settings_tier.notes: Settings page shows MEGA tier badge and Owner (Site Owner) role

frontend_map_search.notes: ZIP code search works, shows '50 found' badge, map zooms to location with markers

frontend_chat_drag.notes: Chat widget has cursor-grab class, GripVertical icon, position changes on drag (tested: moved from x=1821 to x=1424)

frontend_chat_not_blocking.notes: Settings button is clickable, not blocked by chat widget

bugs_fixed_verification.map_no_results_zip: FIXED - Geocode API returns coordinates, places search returns results
bugs_fixed_verification.settings_shows_free: FIXED - Settings shows MEGA tier and owner role
bugs_fixed_verification.chat_blocks_settings: FIXED - Chat widget is draggable, settings button clickable
bugs_fixed_verification.feed_test_posts: FIXED - Feed shows 'No posts yet' after cleanup
bugs_fixed_verification.admin_login_deployed: FIXED - Admin can login on deployed site
